examples: I have to give my props to the governor for the way he handled the problem

meanings.definition: a support placed beneath or against something to keep it from shaking or falling
any movable articles or objects used on the set of a play or movie
examples: before every scene he ran down his checklist of props

meanings.definition: a propeller that rotates to push against air
support by placing against something solid or rigid
examples: shore and buttress an old building
